name: splitter
label: Splitter
description: A draggable split layout with resizable panes. Lay panes out horizontally or vertically with a slim, grabbable gutter between them. Nest splitters for complex layouts.

props.name: direction
props.description: Lay panes side by side (horizontal) or stacked (vertical).

props.name: gutterSize
props.description: Thickness of the draggable gutter in pixels.

props.name: minSize
props.description: Minimum size (px) each pane can shrink to.

usage: Loads Split.js from a CDN automatically. Compose with <x-splitter.pane> children and give each an optional size to set its initial percentage.
